nasb.text: Yet your father has cheated me and changed my wages ten times; however, God did not allow him to hurt me.

esv.text: yet your father has cheated me and changed my wages ten times. But God did not permit him to harm me.

cnv.text: 你們的父親卻欺騙了我，十次更改了我的工資；但　神不容許他傷害我。

ccb.text: 他却欺骗我，把我的工酬更改了十次。然而，上帝不让他苦待我。

csbs.text: 你们的父亲却愚弄我，十次更改了我的工酬；但神不允许他伤害我。
